Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Maintains a dynamic string version of the Git hash for flags.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for real-time updates and tracking of flag versions.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Keeps a dynamic string that logs the timestamp of flag changes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enables immediate access to the timing of flag modifications.

Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string format to record the timestamp of when a flag was flipped.
